---
title: "The Rev. William Andrewes Fearon"
---

## The Rev. William Andrewes Fearon

**Dates:** (1841-1924)

### Description

headmaster (1884-1901) of Winchester College

### Biography

His sister married CMY’s cousin Edmund Anderson Morshead.

### Letters

- Letter from March 27th 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
